sizing_rule.note: Apply optimal f to shrunk average trade: Position Size = optimal_f(average_trade × shrink_factor), where shrink_factor = actual_metric / standard_parametric_value. Requires: (1) arithmetic mean of trades, (2) population std dev, (3) shrink factor calculation, (4) parametric distribution probability mapping. Optimal f value itself not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size using a shrink factor that scales the average trade to account for the gap between standard parametric values and actual trading results, then apply optimal f technique to the shrunk average trade.
